title: project coordinator
description:
Job Title: Project Coordinator – Building Maintenance & Renovation (Shopping Mall, Commercial & Industrial)


We are seeking a detail‑oriented and proactive Project Coordinator to support a diverse portfolio of building maintenance and renovation works, including term contracts, additions/alterations, retrofits, repairs and redecorations, reinstatement, waterproofing, painting, sealant work, sanitary and plumbing, hacking/concreting for pathways and carparks, and minor electrical repairs. Projects are primarily located in shopping malls and commercial/industrial facilities. The successful candidate will coordinate across multiple trades, ensure safety and quality, and help deliver projects on time and within budget.


Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in planning, scheduling, and coordinating projects across multiple work streams (maintenance, A&A, retrofits, repairs/redecoration, reinstatement, waterproofing, painting, sealants, plumbing, hacking/concreting, and minor electrical works) to meet client requirements and timelines.
  • Support tender preparation, supplier quotation management, material sourcing, and printing/packaging of tender documents when needed.
  • Manage procurement coordination, including issuing POs, tracking delivery, and updating project records in Smartsheet.
  • Apply for and track Permit to Work (PTW), conduct risk assessments, and support site safety compliance.
  • Oversee on-site coordination with subcontractors and suppliers, attend site meetings, and document progress with photos and reports.
  • Perform quantity take-offs (QS) from drawings for material planning (e.g, lighting, HVAC troffers, raised access floors) and support BOQ inputs.
  • Maintain project documentation, change logs, progress reports, and close-out support (as-built docs, warranties).

What We’re Looking For

  • Relevant experience in project coordination for building maintenance, fit-outs, or renovation projects in malls, commercial, and industrial environments.
  • Familiarity with procurement processes, subcontractor coordination, and basic QS/BOQ understanding.
  • Strong organizational and multitasking skills with meticulous attention to detail.
  • Good communication and stakeholder management abilities.
  • Proficiency in project management tools (Smartsheet, Microsoft Office) and willingness to learn industry-standard software (e.g., ARIBA if applicable).
  • Safety-conscious with a basic understanding of PTW processes and risk assessment practices.
  • Diploma or degree in Construction Management, Civil/Mech/Elec Engineering, or a related field is preferred; relevant experience may compensate.

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary and benefits package.
  • Opportunity to work on high-profile commercial developments and large-scale maintenance projects.
  • Career development and exposure to tendering, procurement, and on-site coordination.
  • Collaborative, safety-focused work environment.

Qualifications and Requirements

  • Minimum 3 years of project coordination/administration experience in building maintenance or renovation sectors.
  • Ready to work at sites located in malls and commercial/industrial facilities; local travel may be required.
  • Ability to read drawings and understand material take-offs; working knowledge of MS Office and Smartsheet.
  • Knowledge of safety regulations, PTW, and basic QA/QC principles.

We are an equal opportunity employer. We value diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

postedCompany.description:
B K CIVIL & CONSTRUCTION PTE. LTD.

B K Civil & Construction Pte Ltd (BK) CC, founded in 2002 by Mr Lee Yeow Koon (Managing Director), has grown into a nationally recognized organization built on a foundation of hard work and dedication specializing in Building Term Contract, Building Maintenance Services, Internal/External Retrofitting Projects & ‘Green’ product R&D.

Our outstanding team of individuals have the experience, knowledge and commitment to provide products and services that are unique to each project while balancing projects on time and within budget of economic development.  

Our Responsive, Reliable and Professional approach and delivery in service have allowed us to become who we are today and will be instrumental in building our future.
